pairs.question: What company produced the professional wrestling event Dynasty (2024)?
pairs.answer: The professional wrestling pay-per-view event Dynasty (2024) was produced by All Elite Wrestling (AEW).

pairs.question: On what date and at which venue did Dynasty (2024) take place?
pairs.answer: Dynasty (2024) took place on April 21, 2024, at Chaifetz Arena in St. Louis, Missouri.

pairs.question: Who won the main event at Dynasty (2024), and how did they win?
pairs.answer: Swerve Strickland won the main event at Dynasty (2024) by defeating Samoa Joe to become the new AEW World Champion. He won by pinfall after hitting Joe with a sunset flip powerbomb followed by the Swerve Stomp.

pairs.question: What historical significance did Swerve Strickland's victory at Dynasty (2024) hold?
pairs.answer: Swerve Strickland became the first African-American world champion in AEW history by winning the AEW World Championship at Dynasty (2024).

pairs.question: Which wrestler won the AEW TBS Championship at Dynasty (2024), and who was their opponent?
pairs.answer: Willow Nightingale won the AEW TBS Championship at Dynasty (2024) by defeating Julia Hart.

pairs.question: How did The Young Bucks win the vacant AEW World Tag Team Championships at Dynasty (2024)?
pairs.answer: The Young Bucks (Matthew Jackson and Nicholas Jackson) won the vacant AEW World Tag Team Championships by defeating FTR (Dax Harwood and Cash Wheeler) in a tournament final ladder match.

pairs.question: What was notable about the match between Will Ospreay and Bryan Danielson at Dynasty (2024)?
pairs.answer: The match between Will Ospreay and Bryan Danielson was highly acclaimed, receiving a rating of six and a half stars from Dave Meltzer of the Wrestling Observer Newsletter, making it the second-highest rated match he has ever given.

pairs.question: What significant return occurred at Dynasty (2024)?
pairs.answer: Jack Perry made his return to AEW at Dynasty (2024) after being absent due to a legitimate backstage incident involving the now-fired CM Punk.
